driAgentPatamon.title: Patamon (DRI Kazuki)
driAgentPatamon.description: Add Patamon to your Digimon party

requisites.partyLevel: Have a party level between 45 and 60

1.description: Look for DRI Kazuki in Central Park

2.description: Defeat MagnaAngemon in battle to receive Patamon's DDNA

3.description: Deliver Patamon's DNA to DRI Kazuki
